summary: Full validation of NEW Regional Product Waves© engine + Phase-1 admin supplier controls. Backend pytest: 27/27 passed covering regions CRUD, supplier wave CRUD (create/list/get/edit/delete/order-summary), public stripping of supplier_id+supplier_cost, join validation (tyres require garage / electronics require delivery_address), auto-activation when units>=min_activation, consumer wave-orders cancel (releases reservations), admin oversight (list/state/delete) and admin supplier suspend/unsuspend + supplier detail. Frontend: /waves browse, /wave/:id detail (variant tiles, qty, accept-terms, Join), /supplier/waves manager (Create Wave modal with products+variants), /admin Regional Waves tab (Region chip manager + waves table with state dropdown + delete), /admin Suppliers tab (Suspend + soft + hard delete buttons) — all render correctly with proper data-testids. No critical issues.

covers: GET /api/waves (public list strips supplier_id + supplier_cost from variants)
POST /api/waves/{id}/join — tyres require garage (400), electronics require delivery_address (400), success path, auto-activates wave when units_committed reaches min_activation

playwright_flows: Public /waves browse (anonymous): 2 live waves rendered, filters category/region/search present, wave-card-* testids found
/wave/:id detail (anonymous): variant-tile-*, wave-units, wave-state, accept-terms-checkbox, join-wave-btn, delivery-address present
Admin login → /admin → admin-tab-regional (Regional Waves): 5 region-chip-* + new-region-input + add-region-btn + admin-wave-row/state/delete for each wave
Admin Suppliers tab: 5 supplier rows with verify + supplier-suspend-* + supplier-soft-delete-* + supplier-hard-delete-* testids

Supplier login → /supplier/waves: empty state + create-wave-btn; Create Wave modal opens with wave-form-modal, add-product-btn, product-block-0, product-model-0, variant-row-0-0, add-variant-0, save-wave-btn
frontend.js_console_errors: Only an expected 401 on initial /auth/me when anonymous; one transient WebSocket close warning on /api/ws/waves (cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: routes/waves.py + routes/admin_suppliers.py use build_router(deps) DI pattern consistent with admin_users.py/terms.py — clean separation.
Public _public_wave correctly strips supplier_id at wave level AND supplier_cost at variant level — verified by test.
Auto-activation transition open→activated is triggered inside join handler via _recompute and verified end-to-end.
Cancel order (DELETE /me/wave-orders/{id}) correctly recomputes units_committed and releases reservation — verified.
Admin Regional Waves tab uses testid 'admin-tab-regional' (not 'admin-tab-regional-waves') — naming is acceptable but inconsistent with verbose 'pending_waves' sibling; consider standardising.
Suspend supplier correctly propagates to linked users collection + purges sessions, and refuses to touch admin-owned suppliers (defence-in-depth).
test_credentials: Admin founder@thecollectivesavers.co.uk / SaversCollective ; Supplier supplier_test@collective.co / Supplier1234 ; consumer registered fresh via /api/auth/register (cookie-based session).
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed transient waves and a TEST_ region that are deleted in their own teardown. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite: /app/backend/tests/test_regional_waves.py (27 tests, ~5s). Login is cookie-based (no bearer). Public /api/waves must keep stripping supplier_id and supplier_cost — there is an explicit test for that. Admin Regional Waves tab testid is 'admin-tab-regional'. Auto-activation min threshold test creates a footwear wave with ideal=5/min=2 and joins 2 units. Tyre garages must exist for tyre-join positive tests (we only assert the 400 path; positive tyre-join needs a real garage_id from GET /api/garages).
